title: Runlight Dog Training Treat Pouch Fanny Pack,Dog Waist Belt,Dog Walking Bag Crossbody with Poop Bags,Puppy Treat Bag Training Pouch G178 (Black, One Size)
features: This is the perfect treat pouch for any pet occasion!The fabric is durable and the material is easy to wipe clean.There are two separate zip pockets.Two D-rings buckles on the side (can be used to hang dog bowl or dog leash).
The versatility of the adjustable strap.It easily transforms the bag from a sleek cross-body to a trendy fanny pack,adapting to your style and needs.
Removable & Washable Treat Pouch:The velcro-secured treat pouch is a game-changer.It’s so easy to remove and clean,and no crumbs are left behind!

Poop Bag Dispenser:Never be caught without a poop bag again! Our discrete poop bag dispenser allows for quicker pick ups.This feature is both stylish and practical.It dispenses poop bags discreetly,making it convenient and hassle-free.

The dual compartment offers ample space to keep everything organized—treats,wallet,phone and more.It’s incredibly convenient and keeps everything in its rightful place.This pet accessory bag is a perfect blend of style and functionality.It has made your walks with your dog so much easier and more enjoyable.Big Enough forEveryday Use.Highly recommend it to all dog parents!
